{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crimson Demon Eye
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10939
|idx=90
|description=This ocular artifact pulses with hellish vermilion radiance, casting a dual-tone apocalypse where only scorching red and abyssal black remain - like a satanic Instagram filter made flesh.
|skill=
|hp=2970
|def=169
|atk=163
|rush=216
|gene1=Fire DMG +90
|gene2=Fire RES +90
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Per 40 wishes made, {race} ATK +7
Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|gene5=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +10%
|gene7=Fire DMG +4.5% (Awakened)
|}}
